text: Handling deadlines is an important skill in both work and study. Good time management helps you avoid last‑minute panic. Start by breaking large tasks into smaller steps and estimating how long each will take. Prioritization is also key: focus on the most urgent or important tasks first. If you have too much to do, consider scope management. This means adjusting what you plan to finish or asking for extra time if needed. Finally, communication is essential. If you see a problem early, tell your team or manager. Explaining your situation honestly can help you find a solution together.
